design_philosophy.identity: The Performance Pro - Tactical Command Center
core_principles: Information Density vs Clarity: High density for monitoring, absolute clarity for alerts.
Tactical Minimalism: No decoration without function. Every pixel must serve the operator.
Latency Visualization: The interface must feel 'live'. Use pulsing indicators for real-time status.
Dark Mode Default: Optimized for 24/7 dark room operation.

rules: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headers and numeric KPIs to save horizontal space.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for timestamps, coordinates, and vehicle license plate data.
Alert headers must be UPPERCASE and tracking-wide.

admin_dashboard.structure: grid grid-cols-12 gap-4 h-screen max-h-screen overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(239,68,68,0.3)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-100 border border-zinc-700 rounded-md px-4 py-2
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-800/50 rounded-md px-3 py-1

cards.default: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-5 backdrop-blur-sm
cards.alert: bg-red-950/20 border border-red-500/50 rounded-lg p-5 animate-pulse-slow relative overflow-hidden
cards.video_container: relative bg-black border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg overflow-hidden aspect-video group

inputs.default: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-600

status_indicators.live_dot: w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-red-500 animate-pulse shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(239,68,68,0.8)]

navigation.sidebar: bg-zinc-950 border-r border-zinc-800 h-full flex flex-col items-center py-4 gap-4
navigation.header: bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-zinc-800 h-16 flex items-center px-6 justify-between z-50 sticky top-0

visual_enhancers.scanlines: background: linear-gradient(rgba(18, 16, 16, 0) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 50%), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.06), rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.02), rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.06)); background-size: 100% 2px, 3px 100%;
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'Tracing Beam' effect for active alerts: a moving gradient border.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure red alerts are readable on dark backgrounds. Use pure white text on red backgrounds.
accessibility.motion: Allow users to disable flashing alerts in settings.
accessibility.sound: Visual cues must accompany all sound alerts.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons if not present.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout for the main dashboard.
Use the provided image URLs for placeholders in the Video Feed components.
For the 'Alerts' panel, use a high-contrast red border or background to immediately draw attention.
Ensure the video feed player has a 'LIVE' indicator (pulsing red dot).
The layout must be responsive. On mobile, stack video feeds vertically.
Use 'recharts' for any analytics charts (Accident History stats).
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Component Reuse: Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Export Conventions: Components MUST use named exports; Pages MUST use default exports.
